name: Frigate NVR
description: Self-hosted NVR with AI object detection — cameras, events, clips. RTSP/ONVIF cameras, local CPU detection, optional Coral TPU.
author: Crow

env_vars.name: FRIGATE_URL
env_vars.description: Frigate base URL (authenticated UI+API on :8971). Use http:// when config.yml has tls.enabled=false (recommended on loopback).

env_vars.name: FRIGATE_USER
env_vars.description: Admin user for JWT login (POST /api/login). Omit with FRIGATE_PASSWORD if auth.enabled=false in config.yml.

env_vars.name: FRIGATE_CONFIG_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path for Frigate config directory.

env_vars.name: FRIGATE_MEDIA_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path for recordings and snapshots.

env_vars.name: FRIGATE_RTSP_PASSWORD
env_vars.description: Password for Frigate's internal RTSP restreamer.

notes: Recordings default to 7-day retention per config.yml.example. Increase retain.days at your own disk risk — grackle baseline is already tight. Port 5000 (internal unauthenticated API) is intentionally NOT exposed.
